Assertion.rationale: This is the second project on the wedge (the first outside junto's own repo) — installed to test the thesis that junto is decision memory for agent-heavy development. The channel starts empty; its value gets measured by whether future wmux sessions consult and add to it.
Assertion.statement: junto installed in this repo (2026-06-10): channel 'wmux' (id db9c6143) opened with Dan's noreply git identity as founder; Claude Code granted membership; .mcp.json + SessionStart recall hook + .junto.toml binding wired by junto init; the record syncs to this repo's GitHub remote under refs/junto/*. Agents: follow the consult/record convention in CLAUDE.md — consult the injected brief before deciding, record consequential decisions here after.
